articles.title: GET THE WORLD'S FASTEST WHISPER INFERENCE WITH BASETEN
articles.summary: Baseten's model performance engineers have built the world's fastest inference engine for Whisper, the best open-source audio transcription (speech-to-text) AI model.

articles.title: Get the world's best Whisper inference with Baseten
BAIDU ANNOUNCES ITS OWN PAIR OF AI SMART GLASSES
articles.summary: Baidu launched a pair of AI-powered smart glasses that uses the company's ERNIE generative AI at its World Conference. Baidu also introduced an AI image generator and a tool for creating software without coding expertise. ByteDance's Doubao is currently China's leading AI chatbot in terms of monthly active users.

articles.title: OPENAI CO-FOUNDER GREG BROCKMAN RETURNS AFTER THREE MONTHS OF LEAVE
articles.summary: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman has returned to OpenAI as president, following a sabbatical, amid significant executive departures and controversy over its shift to a for-profit model. OpenAI recently secured a $157 billion valuation in its latest funding round. The company is facing internal challenges as leaders like Mira Murati, Bob McGrew, and Lilian Weng have left.

articles.title: EUROPEAN GOOGLE RIVALS PARTNER ON SEARCH ENGINE INFRASTRUCTURE TO COUNTER BIG TECH
articles.summary: Ecosia and Qwant are partnering to build a European search index to reduce reliance on U.S. Big Tech and enhance AI capabilities. The venture utilizes a "privacy-first" approach and aims to support advancements in AI through a new search infrastructure. Alternative search providers are facing rising API costs - this move positions them to better compete amid the growing influence of generative AI in search.

articles.title: SPECULATION ON TEST TIME COMPUTE (47 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: This video covers o1 models, how they could potentially be replicated, and how useful they will be for various tasks in the future.

articles.title: EFFICIENTNAT BOOSTS SPEED IN IMAGE GENERATION
articles.summary: EfficientNAT is a refined non-autoregressive Transformer model designed to enhance both the speed and quality of token-based image generation.

articles.title: DETECTING GRAPH ANOMALIES
articles.summary: UniGAD is a new framework for graph anomaly detection (GAD) that identifies irregularities across nodes, edges, and entire graphs simultaneously.

articles.title: FAST, AFFORDABLE AI INFERENCE AT SCALE
articles.summary: Transform AI development with Nebius AI Studio [14]—a powerful platform offering top-tier models like Llama-3 and Mixtral at up to 50% savings. Choose between "base" and "fast" speeds, access an OpenAI-compatible API, and enjoy advanced features like batch processing. Limited-time: $100 free credits! Start building smarter

articles.title: OBJECT AND ATTRIBUTE MATCHING IN IMAGES WITH TOKEN MERGING
articles.summary: Token Merging addresses a common issue in text-to-image models: difficulty in linking objects with their specific attributes, also known as semantic binding.

articles.title: COMPRESSING MESH DATA FOR 3D GENERATION
articles.summary: Blocked and Patchified Tokenization (BPT) is a mesh compression method that reduces mesh sequence length by about 75%, enabling efficient generation of meshes with over 8k faces.

articles.title: LEARNING FROM EXPERT DEMOS
articles.summary: Successor Feature Matching is a novel, non-adversarial approach to inverse reinforcement learning that skips reward function learning.

articles.title: DATACHAIN
articles.summary: DataChain is a Pythonic data-frame library for AI that allows efficient processing and organization of unstructured data into datasets without abstracting AI models. It supports integration with AI tools like PyTorch, TensorFlow, and LLM APIs, enabling operations such as metadata generation, filtering, and vector search. The library also features built-in parallelization, out-of-memory compute, and vectorized operations on Python object fields.

articles.title: OASIS: A UNIVERSE IN A TRANSFORMER
articles.summary: Oasis is a fully AI-generated, real-time open-world video game model that uses a 500M parameter foundation model without a game engine. It employs fast transformer inference for generating gameplay and is optimized for Etched's Sohu ASIC to achieve high frame rate efficiencies. While demonstrating significant potential, challenges such as domain generalization and long-context consistency remain.

articles.title: BROWSER-USE
articles.summary: This open-source web automation tool allows LLMs to interact with websites via a simplified interface. It supports models like GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. Key features include multi-tab management, XPath extraction, and customizable actions. The tool enables seamless web navigation and data extraction. Its limitations include message length, which affects LLM speed and task repetition. Ongoing development will focus on robustness and cost reduction.

articles.title: 12 HOUR CUDA COURSE (YOUTUBE PLAYLIST)
articles.summary: A great course from freeCodeCamp on CUDA programming from start to finish.

articles.title: 1PRICE (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: 1Price.co allows any company to dynamically change prices on autopilot with AI to maximize revenue per customer.

articles.title: CONTEXT AUTOPILOT (PRODUCT LAUNCH)
articles.summary: Context Autopilot is a unified AI workspace.
